title: AMD and OpenAI Announce Strategic Partnership to Deploy 6 Gigawatts of AMD GPUs
summary: AMD and OpenAI are partnering to deploy 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs, starting with 1 gigawatt in 2026, to power OpenAI's next-generation AI infrastructure.
why_included: This partnership between AMD and OpenAI signifies a major investment in AI infrastructure, with AMD GPUs powering OpenAI's next-generation models.
